summary: Classified the five open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, raise_pr, and post-merge close are disabled by the supplied fix artifact. Security preflight found no security-sensitive job refs. The only escalations are narrow maintainer/technical-review decisions for PRs that are maintainer-owned, ready for maintainer look, or blocked on actionable review findings.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned/maintainer-labeled documentation direction and stale guidance reconciliation require maintainer judgment; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed for this shard.
Keep open as related to #42798; it is a focused bug-fix candidate but still lacks required real behavior proof and this job cannot fix or merge it.
This focused bug-fix PR is plausibly useful and proof-supported, but maintainer review/technical correctness judgment remains required and this shard cannot merge or repair failing checks.
Keep open as related follow-up cleanup rather than closing: it has a plausible user-facing docs/error-message improvement, but lacks proof and needs technical review.
Active author follow-up and technical correctness judgment are required because actionable review-bot findings remain unresolved on a compatibility/message-delivery feature PR.
